# programs.fish

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.fish`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.fish.binds` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Manage key bindings |
| `programs.fish.binds.<name>.command` | `string or list of string (optional when erase is set to true)` | command that will be execute |
| `programs.fish.binds.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable enable the bind. Set false if you want to ignore the bind. |
| `programs.fish.binds.<name>.erase` | `boolean` | Whether to enable remove bind. |
| `programs.fish.binds.<name>.mode` | `null or one of "default", "insert", "paste" or string` | Specify the bind mode that the bind is used in |
| `programs.fish.binds.<name>.name` | `null or string` | The key name that is used for the bind. If null, the attribute set key is used. |
| `programs.fish.binds.<name>.operate` | `null or one of "preset", "user"` | Operate on preset bindings or user bindings |
| `programs.fish.binds.<name>.repaint` | `boolean` | Whether to enable redraw prompt after command. |
| `programs.fish.binds.<name>.setsMode` | `null or one of "default", "insert", "paste" or string` | Change current mode after bind is executed |
| `programs.fish.binds.<name>.silent` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Operate silently. |
| `programs.fish.completions` | `attribute set of (strings concatenated with "\n" or (submodule))` | Custom fish completions. For more information see <https://fishshell.com/docs/current/completions.html>. |
| `programs.fish.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable fish, the friendly interactive shell. |
| `programs.fish.functions` | `attribute set of (strings concatenated with "\n" or (submodule))` | Basic functions to add to fish. For more information see <https://fishshell.com/docs/current/cmds/function.html>. |
| `programs.fish.generateCompletions` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the automatic generation of completions based upon installed man pages. |
| `programs.fish.interactiveShellInit` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Shell script code called during interactive fish shell initialisation. |
| `programs.fish.loginShellInit` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Shell script code called during fish login shell initialisation. |
| `programs.fish.package` | `package` | The fish package to use. |
| `programs.fish.plugins` | `list of (submodule)` | The plugins to source in {file}`conf.d/99plugins.fish`. |
| `programs.fish.plugins.*.name` | `string` | The name of the plugin. |
| `programs.fish.plugins.*.src` | `absolute path` | Path to the plugin folder. Relevant pieces will be added to the fish function path and the completion path. The {file}`init.fish` and {file}`key_binding.fish` files are sourced if they exist. |
| `programs.fish.preferAbbrs` | `boolean` | If enabled, abbreviations will be preferred over aliases when other modules define aliases for fish. |
| `programs.fish.shellAbbrs` | `attribute set of (string or (submodule))` | An attribute set that maps aliases (the top level attribute names in this option) to abbreviations. Abbreviations are expanded with the longer phrase after they are entered. |
| `programs.fish.shellAliases` | `attribute set of string` | An attribute set that maps aliases (the top level attribute names in this option) to command strings or directly to build outputs. |
| `programs.fish.shellInit` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Shell script code called during fish shell initialisation. |
| `programs.fish.shellInitLast` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Shell script code called during interactive fish shell initialisation, this will be the last thing executed in fish startup. |
